title: matthiola fragrans
intro: Matthiola fragrans, also known as Fragrant Stock or Garden Stock, is a flowering plant species in the genus Matthiola. The plant is known for its fragrant, white, pink, or purple flowers and is native to the Mediterranean region. Matthiola fragrans has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall health and well-being.
